response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Kobo Kanaeru based on the hashtag '#3DKobornDay2025' visible on-screen. 2. Observed that the initial scene (00:00-00:08) is an introduction without music. 3. Identified that the subsequent scene (00:09-01:14) is a vocal performance. 4. Extracted the lyrics displayed on-screen, 'Thank you! I can't be as bright as now Without you!'. 5. Determined this is an original, short birthday song snippet for the stream, designating 'Without you (3DKobornDay2025 Special)' as the song title. 6. Constructed the scene breakdown accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features Kobo Kanaeru performing a short song during her 3D birthday stream, titled '3DKobornDay2025', as indicated by the on-screen hashtag. The segment starts with an introduction, followed by a vocal performance with the displayed lyrics 'Thank you! I can't be as bright as now Without you!'.
